jobs.title: PIZZA SHIFT
jobs.instructions: Tap tips as they pop up on your route. Build combos for bigger payouts.

jobs.title: DISHWASHER
jobs.instructions: Tap dirty plates before they pile up. Faster scrubbing = more tips.

jobs.title: BURGER FLIP
jobs.instructions: Hit [HIT] when the cursor lands in the green zone. Chain hits for combos.

jobs.title: CASHIER
jobs.instructions: Tap customers at the register. Ring them up before they leave.

jobs.title: MANAGER
jobs.instructions: Oversee the floor. Rare meeting bonuses pop up — tap to collect.

jobs.title: CEO
jobs.instructions: Mostly passive income. Tap golf invites and board meetings when they appear.

jobs.title: SIGN SPINNER
jobs.instructions: Time your spins perfectly. Miss the zone and your combo resets.

jobs.title: DATA ENTRY
jobs.instructions: Tap the matching key before the timer runs out. Speed builds combos.

jobs.title: DAY TRADER
jobs.instructions: Buy or sell on the ticker. Fast calls earn volatile bonuses.
